response.justification: Bogdan is an exceptionally experienced engineer with 30+ years in software development and strong software craftsmanship practices, but his C++ experience is outdated (2000-2001) and his recent career has been dominated by web/JavaScript/TypeScript development. The role requires hands-on C++ systems programming for industrial automation with specific domain expertise (IoT, industrial protocols, IEC 62443 standards) that is absent from his background. While his fundamentals, testing discipline, and mentorship abilities are strong, significant ramp-up time would be required to reach proficiency in the core technical requirements.
strengths: 30+ years of proven senior-level experience with consistent track record across multiple companies and technical leadership demonstrated through mentoring and workshops
Strong software engineering practices including TDD, CI/CD, DevOps, and agile methodologies with demonstrated ability to build scalable, testable systems
Experienced across multiple languages and domains showing quick learning ability, with successful transitions between technologies and platforms
concerns: C++ expertise is 20+ years outdated (last significant work in 2000-2001); entire recent career focused on JavaScript/TypeScript and web development
No demonstrated background in industrial automation, IoT, embedded systems, or required protocols (Modbus, IEC 61850, DNP 3.0, OPC UA)
No evidence of secure coding practices or compliance experience with industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443), which are core to the role

key_factors.factor: Outdated C++ expertise with 20-year web development focus
Missing industrial automation and cybersecurity domain knowledge
